mapper.select:
SELECT id, examPaperId, examineeName, examineeNo, startedAt, submittedAt, totalScore FROM qbank_exam_session
AND examPaperId = #{paperId}
AND examineeName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{examineeName}, '%')
ORDER BY startedAt DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qbank_exam_session (examPaperId, examineeName, examineeNo) VALUES (#{examPaperId}, #{examineeName}, #{examineeNo})
